parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Nextcloud destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise nclouds:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Nextcloud admin notification directly to your Nextcloud server's notification API, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: shortMessage={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&longMessage={* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Nextcloud server notification API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Nextcloud destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud host

target_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud target username; used by the gateway-plus transformer channel

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud targets
